column1: # Drive the REAL game to write blood.sav — STATUS: reaches the save-slot UI (grey
# name bar + CANCEL, vs_005..vs_014) but the name entry needs ASCII-carrying key
# events. STATUS 2: ASCII keys (key <sc> <ascii>) + correctly-placed ring clicks on
# the slot bar still don't commit — the slot UI's input path is NOT a hot int16 poll
# (SAVESAMPLE ip histogram shows only the hand fill + VGA blit + timer). FOUND along
# the way: the real slot filenames are game<N>.sav (the LOAD row open-traces
# game1.sav) — bloodsav.rs updated. The UI input decode (which event source commits a
# slot) is the remaining step; the FORMAT itself is already static-decoded from
# Original flow: CANCEL the arrival presentation, open the
# OPTION submenu, click SAVE (row 2 of TEXT/MUSIC_OFF/SAVE/LOAD/QUIT/CANCEL at pitch 11
